summary: Teams Delegated Permissions Phase A Testing Complete. All backend tests passed (6/6). All frontend UI tests passed. The implementation correctly handles: (1) Teams appointments with creation_mode='application_fallback' show orange warning banner with 'identité technique' mention and link to /settings/integrations, (2) Teams appointments with creation_mode='delegated' show green confirmation, (3) Settings/Integrations page shows 'Mise à jour recommandée' banner for Outlook without OnlineMeetings scope, (4) Meet and physical appointments show correct identity blocks (no regression), (5) Backend logs show '[MEETING] Teams APPLICATION FALLBACK' when creating in fallback mode.

backend: GET /api/appointments/{teams_fallback_id} returns creator_email='igaal.hanouna@starauto.fr' from Azure AD
GET /api/appointments/{teams_fallback_id} returns azure_user_id in metadata (application_fallback mode)
GET /api/calendar/connections returns Outlook connection (has_online_meetings_scope=None for old connection)
POST /api/appointments/ with meeting_provider=teams creates appointment with creation_mode='application_fallback'
Backend logs show '[MEETING] Teams APPLICATION FALLBACK for user d13498f9 (azure_user_id=79f6849a)'
frontend: Teams fallback: teams-legacy-mode-warning banner is present (orange)
Teams fallback: Warning contains link to /settings/integrations
Teams fallback: teams-delegated-mode is NOT present (correct for fallback mode)
Teams fallback: proof-status-auto is present (Teams has auto attendance)
Teams delegated: teams-delegated-mode is present (green confirmation)
Teams delegated: teams-legacy-mode-warning is NOT present
Teams delegated: Shows 'Réunion créée sous votre propre identité Microsoft'
Settings/Integrations: Banner mentions 'Mise à jour recommandée'
Meet: teams-legacy-mode-warning is NOT present (correct for Meet)
Meet: proof-status-no-auto is present (Meet Gmail personal)

critical_code_review_comments: meeting_provider_service.py lines 386-504: Teams delegated vs fallback logic correctly implemented with proper logging
meeting_provider_service.py line 478: Logs '[MEETING] Teams APPLICATION FALLBACK' when using fallback mode
meeting_provider_service.py lines 486-503: Enriches metadata with creation_mode, creator_email, azure_user_id
calendar_routes.py line 331: has_online_meetings_scope stored at connection time
AppointmentDetail.js lines 1029-1043: Teams creation mode indicators correctly implemented
Integrations.js lines 240-259: Outlook upgrade scope banner correctly implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teams Delegated Permissions Phase A fully tested. Key verified features: (1) Teams appointments with creation_mode='application_fallback' show orange 'Mode legacy — identité technique' warning with link to /settings/integrations, (2) Teams appointments with creation_mode='delegated' show green '✓ Réunion créée sous votre propre identité Microsoft' confirmation, (3) Settings/Integrations shows 'Mise à jour recommandée' banner for Outlook without OnlineMeetings.ReadWrite scope, (4) Backend logs '[MEETING] Teams APPLICATION FALLBACK' when creating in fallback mode. Data-testids verified: teams-legacy-mode-warning (orange), teams-delegated-mode (green), outlook-upgrade-scope-banner, upgrade-outlook-scope-btn. The current test user has an old Outlook connection without has_online_meetings_scope, so all Teams creations go through application_fallback mode.

code_verification.meeting_provider_service.py_delegated_vs: Lines 386-504 - Correct priority: delegated first, fallback second
code_verification.AppointmentDetail.js_creation_mode_indic: Lines 1029-1043 - Orange for fallback, green for delegated
code_verification.Integrations.js_upgrade_banner: Lines 240-259 - Shows when has_online_meetings_scope is false/null
